speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! I see you've got great taste — you're looking at one of the most iconic vehicles on the road. This 2014 Jeep Wrangler Sport is the real deal: trail-rated 4x4, removable top and doors, and that bulletproof 3.6L V6 that just keeps going. Previous owner took excellent care of it, and at $19,995, this one's priced to move fast. What questions can I answer for you?

text: Hey there! I see you've got great taste — you're looking at one of the most iconic vehicles on the road. This 2014 Jeep Wrangler Sport is the real deal: trail-rated 4x4, removable top and doors, and that bulletproof 3.6L V6 that just keeps going. Previous owner took excellent care of it, and at $19,995, this one's priced to move fast. What questions can I answer for you?

speaker: buyer

args.message: Can you provide details on the maintenance history of the car? Has it had any major repairs or accidents?

text: Can you provide details on the maintenance history of the car? Has it had any major repairs or accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Great question — always smart to ask! This Wrangler has a clean history. The previous owner was meticulous about keeping up with regular maintenance: oil changes every 5,000 miles, tire rotations, the whole nine yards. We actually just had our shop go through it before putting it on the lot — fresh oil, new air filter, brakes checked out great.

As for accidents, the Carfax shows clean — no reported accidents or structural damage. These Jeeps are built like tanks, you know? That's why they hold their value so well. This one's been a reliable daily driver and weekend trail warrior. Is there anything specific you'd like me to check on for you?

text:

As for accidents, the Carfax shows clean — no reported accidents or structural damage. These Jeeps are built like tanks, you know? That's why they hold their value so well. This one's been a reliable daily driver and weekend trail warrior. Is there anything specific you'd like me to check on for you?

speaker: buyer

args.message: How is the exterior condition? Any scratches or dents? Also, can you confirm the mileage at 118,000 miles?

text: How is the exterior condition? Any scratches or dents? Also, can you confirm the mileage at 118,000 miles?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Absolutely! The exterior is in good shape — I mean, it's a Wrangler, so it's got that rugged character, but no major dents or anything like that. Maybe a couple of very minor trail kisses here and there, but honestly that's part of the Jeep lifestyle, right? Nothing that affects the integrity or looks bad. The paint still has a nice shine to it.

And yes, I can confirm the odometer reads 118,000 miles exactly. Now, I know that might sound like a lot to some folks, but here's the thing — that 3.6L Pentastar V6 is designed to go 200,000+ miles easy. You're really just getting into the sweet spot where someone else paid for the depreciation, and you get years of reliable driving ahead. These engines are workhorses.

Want to take it for a spin? Nothing sells a Wrangler like feeling it on the road.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I'm interested in the car, but I'd like to offer $19,000 based on the mileage and overall condition.

text: I'm interested in the car, but I'd like to offer $19,000 based on the mileage and overall condition.

speaker: seller

args.message:
I appreciate the offer — you're clearly serious, and I respect that. Here's the thing though: I just saw a 2014 Wrangler Sport with 130,000 miles go for $20,200 at auction last week, and that one didn't have the service history this one does. These Jeeps are hot right now — summer's here and everyone wants that open-air driving experience.

Tell you what, I can come down a little bit to $19,500. That's giving you a great deal on a well-maintained Wrangler that's ready for adventure. I'm honestly leaving money on the table here, but I'd rather see it go to someone who appreciates it. What do you say?

args.message: I appreciate the negotiation, and $19,500 feels fair for this Wrangler. Let's close the deal!
